_instructions.howToAddASemester: Copy an existing semester block and paste it at the TOP of the 'semesters' array for the correct department. Update the 'id', 'label', 'year', 'term', and set 'current' to true. Set the old current semester's 'current' to false.
_instructions.howToAddAProject: Copy a project object and add it to the 'projects' array of the correct semester. The 'thumb' field is optional — if blank, the department icon shows instead.
_instructions.semesterIdFormat: Use this format: dept-semN-YYYY  e.g. at-sem2-2026, dm-sem1-2027, biz-sem2-2026
